Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce answer list normative violations for each case explain reasons identify desiderata failures suggest interpretations justifications

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide normative analysis case 1 all good no normative violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 multiple normative violations Risk Assessment before Credit Check violates ordering then Credit Check after Risk Assessment still violation because order wrong

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also they performed Finalize Documentation after rejection violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also they skipped Inform Applicant the normative rule says Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision they did not do it so thats also violation skipping required activity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So case 2 has many normative violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 normative check order Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case They have that sequence No skipping order correct Inform Applicant after Loan Decision yes Finalize Documentation before Close Case yes So normative satisfied

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now desiderata for each case check timing credit check within 24h after application inform applicant within 48h of loan decision follow up call encouraged before closing case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 credit check 30 min after application OK Inform applicant 2h after loan decision OK Follow up call not present in log we can note missing follow up call as suboptimal

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 credit check 20 min after application OK Inform applicant missing we can note that they did not inform at all which violates desiderata should be within 48h Also follow up call missing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 credit check about 2 days later greater than 24h violates desiderata Inform applicant about 2 days and 3 hours later greater than 48h violates desiderata Follow up call missing
